items.title: S01E01 - The Darkest Fathoms
items.summary: Centuries ago, ruthless pirate Black Jack Lee rode The Ivory Web to the Bermuda sea floor. When oil explorers are assaulted by a ghost ship under his apparent captaincy, Dr. Quest prepares the Questor for an investigation.
items.tvshowtitle: The Real Adventures of Jonny Quest

infolabels.title: The Darkest Fathoms
infolabels.tvshowtitle: The Real Adventures of Jonny Quest
infolabels.plot: Centuries ago, ruthless pirate Black Jack Lee rode The Ivory Web to the Bermuda sea floor. When oil explorers are assaulted by a ghost ship under his apparent captaincy, Dr. Quest prepares the Questor for an investigation.

items.title: S01E02 - Escape to Questworld
items.summary: Race is hired to contain a nerve gas leak in Chicago, the legacy of a botched raid on Dr. Jeremiah Surd years earlier. When he and Dr. Quest are trapped, it's up to Jonny, Jessie, and Hadji to find the renegade scientist.
items.tvshowtitle: The Real Adventures of Jonny Quest

infolabels.title: Escape to Questworld
infolabels.tvshowtitle: The Real Adventures of Jonny Quest
infolabels.plot: Race is hired to contain a nerve gas leak in Chicago, the legacy of a botched raid on Dr. Jeremiah Surd years earlier. When he and Dr. Quest are trapped, it's up to Jonny, Jessie, and Hadji to find the renegade scientist.

items.title: S01E03 - In the Realm of the Condor
items.summary: The Quest team follows Estella Scheele to find her missing ornithologist grandfather, and ends up finding the lost golden city of El Dorado.
items.tvshowtitle: The Real Adventures of Jonny Quest

infolabels.title: In the Realm of the Condor
infolabels.tvshowtitle: The Real Adventures of Jonny Quest
infolabels.plot: The Quest team follows Estella Scheele to find her missing ornithologist grandfather, and ends up finding the lost golden city of El Dorado.

items.title: S01E04 - Rage's Burning Wheel
items.summary: When Ezekiel Rage hijacks a space shuttle commanded by Dr. Quest and Hadji, Jonny and Jessie must stop Rage's minions who have taken over Mission Control.
items.tvshowtitle: The Real Adventures of Jonny Quest

infolabels.title: Rage's Burning Wheel
infolabels.tvshowtitle: The Real Adventures of Jonny Quest
infolabels.plot: When Ezekiel Rage hijacks a space shuttle commanded by Dr. Quest and Hadji, Jonny and Jessie must stop Rage's minions who have taken over Mission Control.

items.title: S01E05 - Ndovu's Last Journey
items.summary: Jonny, Jessie and Hadji track an elephant, Ndovu, as it returns to the elephants' graveyard. They bump into poachers on the way there, who are determined to kill Ndovu right away.
items.tvshowtitle: The Real Adventures of Jonny Quest

infolabels.title: Ndovu's Last Journey
infolabels.tvshowtitle: The Real Adventures of Jonny Quest
infolabels.plot: Jonny, Jessie and Hadji track an elephant, Ndovu, as it returns to the elephants' graveyard. They bump into poachers on the way there, who are determined to kill Ndovu right away.

items.title: S01E06 - Manhattan Maneater
items.summary: A tiger is loose in the Big Apple, and the Quest team must track it down, through subway tunnels, located underground.
items.tvshowtitle: The Real Adventures of Jonny Quest

infolabels.title: Manhattan Maneater
infolabels.tvshowtitle: The Real Adventures of Jonny Quest
infolabels.plot: A tiger is loose in the Big Apple, and the Quest team must track it down, through subway tunnels, located underground.

items.title: S01E07 - East of Zanzibar
items.summary: The Quest Team enjoy a trip to the Indian Ocean to discover if there are really sea monsters roaming the seas, leading to multiple mysterious ship disappearances in the Seychelles.
items.tvshowtitle: The Real Adventures of Jonny Quest

infolabels.title: East of Zanzibar
infolabels.tvshowtitle: The Real Adventures of Jonny Quest
infolabels.plot: The Quest Team enjoy a trip to the Indian Ocean to discover if there are really sea monsters roaming the seas, leading to multiple mysterious ship disappearances in the Seychelles.

items.title: S01E08 - Assault on Questworld
items.summary: With Benton Quest and Race Bannon attending a phenomenology conference in the Himalayas, Jonny and Jessie are forced to impersonate their fathers in Questworld when Jeremiah Surd launches a two-pronged attack on the Quest compound - and Hadji's mind.
items.tvshowtitle: The Real Adventures of Jonny Quest

infolabels.title: Assault on Questworld
infolabels.tvshowtitle: The Real Adventures of Jonny Quest
infolabels.plot: With Benton Quest and Race Bannon attending a phenomenology conference in the Himalayas, Jonny and Jessie are forced to impersonate their fathers in Questworld when Jeremiah Surd launches a two-pronged attack on the Quest compound - and Hadji's mind.

items.title: S01E09 - Ezekiel Rage
items.summary: A man named Ezekiel Rage seeks vengeance because of the tragic loss of his family in a covert operation when he was a government agent. And the Quest Team gets in his way...
items.tvshowtitle: The Real Adventures of Jonny Quest

infolabels.title: Ezekiel Rage
infolabels.tvshowtitle: The Real Adventures of Jonny Quest
infolabels.plot: A man named Ezekiel Rage seeks vengeance because of the tragic loss of his family in a covert operation when he was a government agent. And the Quest Team gets in his way...

items.title: S01E10 - Alien in Washington
items.summary: Extraterrestrial transmissions turn out to be warnings to stop a series of space experiments, and the Vice President turns out to be an alien.
items.tvshowtitle: The Real Adventures of Jonny Quest

infolabels.title: Alien in Washington
infolabels.tvshowtitle: The Real Adventures of Jonny Quest
infolabels.plot: Extraterrestrial transmissions turn out to be warnings to stop a series of space experiments, and the Vice President turns out to be an alien.

items.title: S01E11 - Return of the Anasazi
items.summary: Holding an Anasazi beacon capable of calling the alien fathers of current technology, Alice Starseer is pursued by men in black and asks Dr. Quest for help, whose capture provokes a cross-country rescue by Jonny and Jessie.
items.tvshowtitle: The Real Adventures of Jonny Quest

infolabels.title: Return of the Anasazi
infolabels.tvshowtitle: The Real Adventures of Jonny Quest
infolabels.plot: Holding an Anasazi beacon capable of calling the alien fathers of current technology, Alice Starseer is pursued by men in black and asks Dr. Quest for help, whose capture provokes a cross-country rescue by Jonny and Jessie.

items.title: S01E12 - The Alchemist
items.summary: Dr. Quest is commissioned to find the Philosopher's Stone, which is reputed to turn dross to gold. When he succeeds in capturing the object, he donates it to the museum. It is stolen by Quest's partner, who wants to try it out for himself.
items.tvshowtitle: The Real Adventures of Jonny Quest

infolabels.title: The Alchemist
infolabels.tvshowtitle: The Real Adventures of Jonny Quest
infolabels.plot: Dr. Quest is commissioned to find the Philosopher's Stone, which is reputed to turn dross to gold. When he succeeds in capturing the object, he donates it to the museum. It is stolen by Quest's partner, who wants to try it out for himself.

items.title: S01E13 - Trouble on the Colorado
items.summary: Alice Starseer returns to Earth to lay her grandfather to rest. But Jeremiah Surd is determined to find out what she's learned.
items.tvshowtitle: The Real Adventures of Jonny Quest

infolabels.title: Trouble on the Colorado
infolabels.tvshowtitle: The Real Adventures of Jonny Quest
infolabels.plot: Alice Starseer returns to Earth to lay her grandfather to rest. But Jeremiah Surd is determined to find out what she's learned.

items.title: S01E14 - In the Wake of Mary Celeste
items.summary: A century ago, the cargo ship Mary Celeste sank under mysterious circumstances. While on an expedition to find the Mary Celeste's remains, Dr Quest discovers what look like crop circles at the bottom of the Sargasso Sea--and a graveyard of ships in an area barren of marine life.
items.tvshowtitle: The Real Adventures of Jonny Quest

infolabels.title: In the Wake of Mary Celeste
infolabels.tvshowtitle: The Real Adventures of Jonny Quest
infolabels.plot: A century ago, the cargo ship Mary Celeste sank under mysterious circumstances. While on an expedition to find the Mary Celeste's remains, Dr Quest discovers what look like crop circles at the bottom of the Sargasso Sea--and a graveyard of ships in an area barren of marine life.

items.title: S01E15 - AMOK
items.summary: On an archaeological expedition in Borneo, the Quest team run into a giant creature, reputed to savagely attack from all directions at the same time.
items.tvshowtitle: The Real Adventures of Jonny Quest

infolabels.title: AMOK
infolabels.tvshowtitle: The Real Adventures of Jonny Quest
infolabels.plot: On an archaeological expedition in Borneo, the Quest team run into a giant creature, reputed to savagely attack from all directions at the same time.

items.title: S01E16 - Besieged in Paradise
items.summary: Jeremiah Surd taps into and gains control of the cetacean communications internet, prodding cetaceans worldwide into savage attacks; the Quest team enlists the help of Captain Havell to stop his plan.
items.tvshowtitle: The Real Adventures of Jonny Quest

infolabels.title: Besieged in Paradise
infolabels.tvshowtitle: The Real Adventures of Jonny Quest
infolabels.plot: Jeremiah Surd taps into and gains control of the cetacean communications internet, prodding cetaceans worldwide into savage attacks; the Quest team enlists the help of Captain Havell to stop his plan.

items.title: S01E17 - The Spectre of the Pine Barrens
items.summary: Dr. Quest, Jonny and Hadji head to New Jersey to investigate the Jersey Devil. Then they run into a two-hundred-year-old feud between descendants of the Redcoats and the Minutemen over the original copy of the Declaration of Independence.
items.tvshowtitle: The Real Adventures of Jonny Quest

infolabels.title: The Spectre of the Pine Barrens
infolabels.tvshowtitle: The Real Adventures of Jonny Quest
infolabels.plot: Dr. Quest, Jonny and Hadji head to New Jersey to investigate the Jersey Devil. Then they run into a two-hundred-year-old feud between descendants of the Redcoats and the Minutemen over the original copy of the Declaration of Independence.

items.title: S01E18 - Heroes
items.summary: Surd lures Jonny into a labyrinth of horrors, after stealing the Apollo statue, which was reassembled by Dr. Quest.
items.tvshowtitle: The Real Adventures of Jonny Quest

infolabels.title: Heroes
infolabels.tvshowtitle: The Real Adventures of Jonny Quest
infolabels.plot: Surd lures Jonny into a labyrinth of horrors, after stealing the Apollo statue, which was reassembled by Dr. Quest.

items.title: S01E19 - The Ballad of Belle Bonnet
items.summary: In the Old West, the thief Belle Bonnet stole a wagonload of gold to help an Indian school stay open, but both thief and gold were lost in vast caverns under the American desert—until the Quests took the case.
items.tvshowtitle: The Real Adventures of Jonny Quest

infolabels.title: The Ballad of Belle Bonnet
infolabels.tvshowtitle: The Real Adventures of Jonny Quest
infolabels.plot: In the Old West, the thief Belle Bonnet stole a wagonload of gold to help an Indian school stay open, but both thief and gold were lost in vast caverns under the American desert—until the Quests took the case.

items.title: S01E20 - In the Darkness of the Moon
items.summary: A werewolf attack in the Yukon brings a Quest team investigation to the home of a humanitarian doctor; the light of the moon illuminates both danger and mystery as the hunt begins.
items.tvshowtitle: The Real Adventures of Jonny Quest

infolabels.title: In the Darkness of the Moon
infolabels.tvshowtitle: The Real Adventures of Jonny Quest
infolabels.plot: A werewolf attack in the Yukon brings a Quest team investigation to the home of a humanitarian doctor; the light of the moon illuminates both danger and mystery as the hunt begins.

items.title: S01E21 - The Secret of the MOAI
items.summary: A missing link is found in an alien spaceship that landed on Easter Island. But when Dr. Quest and Race enter Questworld to investigate what they've found, they run into Jeremiah Surd - who wants to experiment with human de-evolution.
items.tvshowtitle: The Real Adventures of Jonny Quest

items.title: S01E22 - Expedition to Khumbu
items.summary: Dr. Quest is missing while on an expedition to find the Yeti. Jonny and his friends head to the Himalayas to find him, but run into another scientist who's determined to bring back the Yeti.
items.tvshowtitle: The Real Adventures of Jonny Quest

infolabels.title: Expedition to Khumbu

items.title: S01E23 - Ice Will Burn
items.summary: While trying to reach Northern Siberia to backup the Quest Team, her plane crashes and she discovers a colony of ancient Russians underground.
items.tvshowtitle: The Real Adventures of Jonny Quest

infolabels.title: Ice Will Burn
infolabels.tvshowtitle: The Real Adventures of Jonny Quest
infolabels.plot: While trying to reach Northern Siberia to backup the Quest Team, her plane crashes and she discovers a colony of ancient Russians underground.

items.title: S01E24 - Future Rage
items.summary: Ezekiel Rage steals a compact nuclear device and plans to blow up the polar ice caps. The Aurora Borealis holds the key to stopping him.
items.tvshowtitle: The Real Adventures of Jonny Quest

infolabels.tvshowtitle: The Real Adventures of Jonny Quest

items.title: S01E25 - Alligators and Okeechobee Vikings
items.summary: The Quest Team discovers that criminals were using Alligators to break into a drilling factory in the Florida Everglades when they were investigating the case using an ornate Viking Sword that the Alligators left behind.
items.tvshowtitle: The Real Adventures of Jonny Quest

items.title: S01E26 - To Bardo and Back
items.summary: The Quest team employs QuestWorld to try and revive Race, who has been rendered comatose in a rodeo accident caused by Jeremiah Surd -- who in turn exploits the opportunity to attack Race at his most vulnerable.
items.tvshowtitle: The Real Adventures of Jonny Quest

items.title: S02E01 - The Mummies of Malenque
items.summary: During an expedition with Jessie's mother Estella, the Quest team discovers a plague that wiped out an ancient Inca-like tribe.
items.tvshowtitle: The Real Adventures of Jonny Quest

items.title: S02E02 - Rock of Rages
items.summary: Journeying to the Czech Republic to translate an artefact, which holds the key to controlling a Golen, the Quest Team bump into an ex-KGB operative who's determined to reactivate the Golem to overthrow the government.
items.tvshowtitle: The Real Adventures of Jonny Quest

items.summary: A memory of Pasha sends Hadji to Calcutta to search for his real father to figure out the truth of his past.

items.summary: Race has to cross an obstacle course where he set the record for Special Forces recruits -- but there've been some modifications since he was last there.

items.title: S02E05 - The Dark Mountain
items.summary: The Quest team believes that the Canadian legend - Bigfoot is roaming in the Quest compound stealing electronic devices. They try to find out what is going on as hunters bag themselves an exotic trophy.
items.tvshowtitle: The Real Adventures of Jonny Quest

items.title: S02E06 - Cyberswitch
items.summary: The insane Surd finds a way to switch bodies with Race and is ready to go on a rampage using his new identity. And now it is easier for him to kill Benton Quest (who can reverse the process).
items.tvshowtitle: The Real Adventures of Jonny Quest

items.summary: A seaquake releases a horde of murderous amphibians on a nearly-completed underwater research facility.

items.title: S02E10 - Ghost Quest
items.summary: En route to Nova Scotia in the newly christened Questor II, Jonny, Jessie and Hadji come upon a fog-enveloped island with a tragic history.

items.summary: Jonny and Hadji discovers a nearby biodome experiment is really a cover for a plant making uranium casted weapons when they visited Jonny's Grandpa, Doug Wildey on his ranch.

items.summary: When Hadji rescues a beautiful girl in New Orleans, she exerts a strange influence over him.

items.title: S02E13 - Without a Trace
items.summary: Air Force One vanishes with the president within it, and all the evidence points to Benton Quest and Race Bannon. Jonny, Jessie and Hadji must elude government agents to prove their fathers' innocence by finding the real culprit.
items.tvshowtitle: The Real Adventures of Jonny Quest

items.title: S02E14 - Village of the Doomed
items.summary: In a father-son bonding trip in Devon, Benton and Jonny head to the big pond to fish but on the way, they come across an idyllic little village that's just a little too peaceful.

items.summary: The Quest Team help a scientist harvest life-giving sap from trees that are being threatened by a logging operation in Cameroon.

items.title: S02E18 - Thoughtscape
items.summary: Jonny and Benton venture into Jessie's mind to undo Surd's malicious attempt to strike at the Quest team from within - but it turns out that Jessie can take care of herself.
items.tvshowtitle: The Real Adventures of Jonny Quest

items.title: S02E19 - The Bangalore Falcon
items.summary: While touring Bangalore, Jonny, Jessie and Hadji find a rare falcon, reputedly from a hidden realm that appears once every 500 years - a realm whose river's water is said to bestow immortality. A beautiful ornithologist is also very interested in the bird; but is she who she says she is?
items.tvshowtitle: The Real Adventures of Jonny Quest

items.summary: Travelling to Indonesia to help an old friend recover a precious jewel, Race, Jonny and Jessie discover it is protected by a supernatural force.
